title: synaphea constricta
intro: Synaphea constricta, also known as the Narrow-leaved Synaphea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Frankeniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Synaphea constricta include soothing and calming irritated skin, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea, ointment, or infused oil, which can be applied topically to the affected area to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
